---
title: "Week 04: Data structures"
---

## Introduction

Coming soon!

## Recommended readings

- [Python tutorial](https://docs.python.org/3/tutorial/) - Official Python documentation

## Lectures

- [**Slides: Data structures**](../slides/IS4010_W04_Data_Structures.qmd)
